sobreMi.texto: What sets me apart in IT solutions is that I help my clients achieve their goals with work oriented to their needs. I have years of experience in the industry and know many of its details in depth. I have dedicated myself to building custom-made computers with artisanal cases and cooling systems for home use, as well as infrastructures for corporate use in a wide variety of SMEs.

item1.texto: Personal venture, dedicated to PC maintenance and repair, server optimization, network infrastructure installation, custom cooling prototype manufacturing, product sales and online marketing of the brand. Work at both home and corporate level.

item2.texto: Family venture. Repair of automotive electronic failures, system scanning and diagnostics.

curso1.titulo: DKA Formación – Online Course: Server Administrator

curso2.titulo: Fundación Carlos Slim – Online Course: Front-End Developer
